title: Piquant Umami Greek Lamb Keftedes
description: A crowd-pleasing Greek dish featuring lamb keftedes with a blend of umami flavors and a hint of biryani masala, served in a donabe vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground lamb, biryani masala, ferment-jang, onion, garlic, parsley, lemon zest, salt, and black pepper.
Mix the ingredients together with your hands or a wooden spoon until just combined.
Gradually add the gluten-free breadcrumbs and mix until the mixture is cohesive but not overmixed.
Use your hands to shape the mixture into small keftedes, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Place the keftedes in a single layer in a donabe vessel or a large baking dish.
Drizzle the keftedes with a little bit of oil and gently roll them to coat evenly.
Bake the keftedes in the preheated oven for 18-20 minutes, or until cooked through and lightly browned on the outside.
Remove the keftedes from the oven and let them rest for a few minutes before serving.
